text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Community Clinics * Homelessness Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OPERATION NIGHTWATCH DOWNTOWN HOSPITALITY CENTER HOSPITALITY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a safe place where guests can drop in and socialize, play games, and read books. The center provides water, coffee, a hot meal, blankets, socks, and mental health services. 1432 SW 13th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: People experiencing housing insecurity Hours: Thursday-Saturday 6:30pm-10pm Email (503) 220-0438 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPERATION NIGHTWATCH HOSPITALITY CENTER
